title: “THE UFOS’ NIGHT IN BRAZIL” [1986] – Documents #3

text_preview:
## Internal military correspondence

Brasília-DF, June 24, 1986.

From: Controlling Chief Assistant

To: Captain Franciscangelis

Subject: Occurrence

## I – Transcription of the Operational Occurrence book of the Chief Controlling Assistant:

“At 23:39Z the JBAZ carrying out an interception mission, 44FI09 position 70 NM on the radial 360 VOR AN, reported contact with an object and asked if it was a “ghost”.

“THOR” had no radar contact with the reported object. Both aircrafts had visual contact and then on-board radar contact. They reported having contact at about 08 NM. “THOR” was asked to
summary: Military internal report from June 1986 describing an F-5E and F-103 chasing a color-changing object at Mach 1.2 that evaded from 8 NM to beyond radar range in ~5 seconds.
